results.name: Anime Studio Tycoon — Legend Bundle
results.description: Producer Pass (+50% Yen forever, auto-release, 2× offline) + 400 Gems + exclusive Legendary star Aurora Vesper. One-time purchase. Play at anime-studio-tycoon.vercel.app
manual: Gumroad product → Settings → enable Generate license key

results.name: Anime Studio Tycoon — Mogul Bundle
results.description: The ultimate bundle: Producer Pass + 1,500 Gems + exclusive Legendary stars Phoenix Kogane & Kaiser Shogun + Remove Ads. Best value for serious studio builders.
manual: Gumroad product → Settings → enable Generate license key

results.name: Anime Studio Tycoon — Aurora Vesper (Exclusive Star)

results.name: Anime Studio Tycoon — Remove Ads
